traits.name: Stand Firm
traits.text: While Vhosse is adjacent to an ally, she has +3 stability (5 total), can't be knocked prone, and can't be frightened.

traits.name: The Uncounted
traits.text: Ex-Witness confessor who did the math and stopped believing in the total. The scree graffiti is hers. Speaks in funeral liturgy, fights like a landslide. She refuses The Pause — deaths within 10 squares never cost her warband their turns while she lives; death feeds her instead of stopping her (see Witness Me).

passive.name: We Are Already Counted
passive.effect: Allies in the aura gain +1 to power rolls, and their Codified Edict movement provokes nothing, ever. The warband advances as one grieving mass. (Run this once at combat start to place the visible aura; apply the +1 to allied power rolls manually.)

effects.text: We Are Already Counted: allies in the aura have +1 to power rolls, and Codified Edict movement provokes no opportunity attacks.
AURA UP — allies within 5 of Vhosse: +1 to power rolls (add manually to their flat bonus), and Codified Edict movement never provokes.

maneuver.name: Codified Edict
maneuver.effect: Vhosse moves up to her speed toward an enemy, then makes a free strike. Every ally adjacent to her when this maneuver starts may also move up to their speed. (Faction maneuver. Inside her aura, this movement provokes nothing.)

effects.text: Move up to speed toward an enemy.
Free strike at the end of the move.
Codified Edict: every ally adjacent to Vhosse when the maneuver started may also move up to their speed (move them manually).

action.name: Liturgy of the Last Bend
action.effect: Vhosse drags her targets into the dead world she is making.

tier3.tier_effect: pull 4 toward the nearest scree; target's square becomes scree

effects.text: Pull 3 toward the nearest scree (GM places destination).
Pull 4 toward the nearest scree (GM places destination).
Tier 3: the target's square becomes PERMANENT SCREE. Mark the map.

triggered_action.name: Witness Me (2/encounter)
triggered_action.trigger: An ally within 10 squares would die.
triggered_action.effect: The ally drops to 1 Stamina instead of dying. Vhosse and all allies adjacent to her gain +2 damage until the end of the next round. She refuses The Pause — death feeds her instead of stopping her. (Track the 2/encounter limit manually; the +2 damage buff is applied manually.)

cards.condition: An ally within 10 squares would die

effects.text: The ally drops to 1 Stamina instead of dying.
WITNESS ME: Vhosse and all allies adjacent to her gain +2 damage until the end of the next round (apply manually). 2/encounter — track uses manually.

villain_action.name: Villain Action 1 — Stop Counting
villain_action.effect: All allied Tallish ignore Measure Thrice and immediately take a free Codified Edict. The line surges.

effects.text: STOP COUNTING: every allied Tallish ignores Measure Thrice and immediately takes a free Codified Edict — run each one's Codified Edict maneuver from its own tray now (move + free strike, adjacent allies may move).

villain_action.name: Villain Action 2 — Sermon of Scree
villain_action.effect: Vhosse preaches the dead world into being; her allies in the burst take nothing.
villain_action.additional_effect: All stone in the burst becomes permanent scree; Vhosse's allies in the burst take nothing. (Tier damage 5/8/11 is GM-fill — the source block only specified 2d10+3; adjust if you have different values.)

effects.text: SERMON OF SCREE: all stone in the burst becomes PERMANENT SCREE (mark the map). Vhosse's allies in the burst take nothing.

villain_action.name: Villain Action 3 — The Last Working
villain_action.effect: Vhosse pulls a cliff face or structure edge down across a 4-square line. Each creature in the line takes 3d6 damage and is knocked prone — this is terrain, so it ignores Stand Firm. The line becomes scree strewn with half-cover rubble, and she carves the hell-mark into it. The thing she has been promising everyone.

effects.name: prone
effects.text: Terrain ignores Stand Firm — apply prone even to clustered Tallish.
THE LAST WORKING: the 4-square line becomes SCREE with half-cover rubble. Vhosse carves the hell-mark into it. Mark the map.
